summary: Frontend E2E testing of Wolf & Son Vinyl Siding Estimator completed. All 16 review-request flows passed on https://app-converter-170.preview.emergentagent.com using admin@wolfandson.com. Auth (cookie-based via axios withCredentials), Dashboard list+create, EstimateEditor (sticky Base/Sell/Profit bar, live recalculation, save, customer fields, waste/tax/margin controls), QuoteModal (email-not-configured notice + disabled send button + close), photo upload + remove, Catalog edit + save, and Logout all behave correctly.

issues: Default admin credentials are printed directly on the login page footer ('DEFAULT ADMIN · ADMIN@WOLFANDSON.COM / ADMIN123!'). Useful for testing but should be removed before production handoff.

action_items: (Optional) Remove the hard-coded 'DEFAULT ADMIN · admin@wolfandson.com / Admin123!' hint shown on the Login page before production.
(Optional, carried over from iteration_1) Tighten CORS_ORIGINS to explicit frontend origin instead of '*' since the frontend relies on credentialed cookie auth.
(Optional) Apply same samesite='none', secure=True, path='/' to response.delete_cookie in /api/auth/logout so browser-side cookie clearing is reliable.
critical_code_review_comments: EstimateEditor.jsx is ~425 lines and mixes data fetch, calculations, photo upload, sticky bar, totals, settings, and accordions. Could be split (e.g. useEstimate hook, <StickyBar/>, <SectionAccordion/>, <PhotosPanel/>) for maintainability. Not blocking.

Live recalculation correctly fires on every keystroke via useMemo on est state; verified: qty=10 Conquest with waste=10/tax=7/margin=30 produced Base=$2,335.08 → Sell=$3,035.60 → Profit=$700.52 instantly.
Catalog editor performs deep JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(...)) on every keystroke which is wasteful for large catalogs; not user-visible.
QuoteModal disables the Send button when emailConfigured=false AND email is empty — both paths verified. Notice text is amber on dark backdrop, contrast OK.
Photos are stored as relative URLs and prefixed with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL when rendering; upload/serve flow round-trips correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created an estimate with customer_name 'TEST_Acme Customer' and an uploaded test JPG photo (1x1) under the admin account. The photo was removed during the test; the TEST_ estimate remains in the admin account list.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All review-request frontend flows pass against the public preview URL. data-testid attributes on every interactive element are accurate. Cookie auth flows through axios.withCredentials=true. The estimate id created during this run can be ignored or cleaned via DELETE /api/estimates/{id}. Email send endpoint correctly returns 503 'Email service not configured' and the QuoteModal renders the amber notice + disables Send button when /api/email/status returns configured=false.
